api.backendSetupHint: Start the backend with `npm run dev:backend`. `BACKEND_PORT` in `.env` must match the Vite proxy; after changing the port, restart `npm run dev`.

errors.server: {{resource}}: server error (HTTP {{status}}).{{detail}} Check the backend terminal log.
errors.emptyStreamBody: Chat stream: empty response from the server (no response body).

chat.emptyHint: Ask me to generate OpenSCAD code, or describe the 3D model you want to create.
chat.tooltipNewSketch: Start a new sketch from scratch
chat.newSketchBody: This will clear the editor and the entire chat history. You will lose the current model and conversation. Continue?
chat.codeAppliedShort: OpenSCAD code was applied to the editor. Open the Code tab when you want to view or edit it.
chat.loadModelsFallback: Could not load the model list.
chat.noStderr: No errors (stderr) in the current build log.
chat.editorPayloadReminder: (App integration: you must include exactly one ```openscad fenced block with the complete runnable script, or the editor will not update. Prose-only answers are not applied.)

settingsMenu.title: Settings menu
settingsMenu.clearBody: This will clear all the edits you've made and files you've created in this playground and will reset it to factory defaults. Are you sure you wish to proceed? (You might lose your models!)

settingsDialog.title: API key configuration
settingsDialog.loadKeysFailed: Could not load API key status.

scadDialogs.downloadBody: Saves the current editor source. Enable optimization to run it through the backend for FreeCAD-friendly formatting (requires the API backend).
scadDialogs.exportBody: Runs the current script through the backend and downloads FreeCAD-friendly SCAD (requires the API backend).
scadDialogs.freecadInfo: FreeCAD's OpenSCAD workbench imports plain `.scad` files. This export adds a compatibility header and normalizes text for smoother import. For mesh-based workflows, use STL or STEP from a mesher after validating the model in OpenSCAD.
scadDialogs.freecadBackendNote: Requires a running backend (proxied at `/api/v1` in development).
